calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being continued after being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Michael Iriarte

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Matter not reported

Plaintiff JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. is present represented by John Phan, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Michael Iriarte is not present.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., and against Defendant Michael Iriarte, a limited liability company.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A. is awarded judgment against Defendant Michael Iriarte as follows:

Damages/Principal: $18,577.08
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $0
Total Judgment: $18,577.08

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Continued To Jun-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Set For Trial On May-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
